summary: Iteration 69 tested SDI workflow features: Aruba credentials in company_settings, send-sdi endpoint reading from DB, stato-sdi endpoint, and frontend Emetti/Invia SDI buttons. All 11 backend tests passed. All frontend tests passed.
seed_data_creation: Created test user, test client (TEST_SDI_Client_*), and test invoices for SDI workflow testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 69 SDI workflow features all working. Aruba SDI credentials are stored in company_settings collection and read by send-sdi endpoint. Without real Aruba credentials, SDI sending returns clear auth error. All buttons (Emetti for bozza, Invia SDI for emessa) work correctly. Test data: 2 test invoices created during testing.

company_settings_aruba_fields.details: GET/PUT /api/company/settings correctly handles aruba_username, aruba_password, aruba_sandbox fields

send_sdi_reads_from_db.details: POST /api/invoices/{id}/send-sdi reads Aruba credentials from DB company_settings, returns clear error when credentials not configured

send_sdi_validates_status.details: POST /api/invoices/{id}/send-sdi returns 400 for bozza invoices with clear message to emit first

stato_sdi_endpoint.details: GET /api/invoices/{id}/stato-sdi returns 400 if invoice not yet sent to SDI

frontend_integrazioni_tab.details: Settings page has Integrazioni tab with Aruba username/password/sandbox fields, saves successfully

frontend_emetti_button.details: InvoiceEditorPage shows Emetti button for bozza FT/NC documents, hidden after emitting

frontend_invia_sdi_button.details: InvoiceEditorPage shows Invia SDI button only for non-bozza FT/NC documents (after emitting)

invoices_dropdown_options.details: InvoicesPage dropdown has Emetti/Segna Pagata/Invia SDI options based on document status

xml_generation.details: GET /api/invoices/{id}/xml generates valid FatturaPA XML with CedentePrestatore and CessionarioCommittente sections

mocked_apis.aruba_sdi: MOCKED - Aruba SDI API calls fail at authentication step since no real credentials are configured. The system correctly returns 'Autenticazione Aruba fallita' error.
